# ChordDisplay

**Version**: v2.0.0  
**File**: `ChordDisplay.2.0.0.tsx`

Framed chord card wrapping **HeldKeys**: `variant="local"` uses `semanticColors.strokeColour`; `variant="remote"` uses `semanticColors.strokeTheme`.

v1.0.0 is archived at `Archive/ChordDisplay.1.0.0.tsx` (used `altName` and `default` | `colour` | `theme`).
